title: API_DOCS - DevPilot AI
content:
**DevPilot AI API Documentation**

**Overview**
The DevPilot AI platform provides a comprehensive set of APIs for integrating with various services, automating workflows, and enhancing the overall development experience. This documentation outlines the available APIs, their usage, and best practices for integration.

**API Endpoints**

### Project Management

* **Create Project**: `POST /projects`
	+ Request Body: `{name: string, description: string}`
	+ Response: `201 Created` with project ID
* **Get Projects**: `GET /projects`
	+ Query Parameters: `page`, `limit`
	+ Response: Array of projects with IDs and names
* **Update Project**: `PATCH /projects/:id`
	+ Request Body: `{name: string, description: string}`
	+ Response: `200 OK` with updated project details

### Task Management (Kanban)

* **Create Task**: `POST /tasks`
	+ Request Body: `{title: string, description: string, status: string}`
	+ Response: `201 Created` with task ID
* **Get Tasks**: `GET /tasks`
	+ Query Parameters: `project_id`, `status`, `page`, `limit`
	+ Response: Array of tasks with IDs, titles, and statuses
* **Update Task**: `PATCH /tasks/:id`
	+ Request Body: `{title: string, description: string, status: string}`
	+ Response: `200 OK` with updated task details

### Team Collaboration & Chat

* **Create Message**: `POST /messages`
	+ Request Body: `{text: string, project_id: integer}`
	+ Response: `201 Created` with message ID
* **Get Messages**: `GET /messages`
	+ Query Parameters: `project_id`, `page`, `limit`
	+ Response: Array of messages with IDs and texts

### GitHub Integration

* **Create Pull Request**: `POST /pull_requests`
	+ Request Body: `{title: string, description: string, project_id: integer}`
	+ Response: `201 Created` with pull request ID
* **Get Pull Requests**: `GET /pull_requests`
	+ Query Parameters: `project_id`, `page`, `limit`
	+ Response: Array of pull requests with IDs and titles

### AI Documentation Generator

* **Generate Documentation**: `POST /docs`
	+ Request Body: `{project_id: integer, language: string}`
	+ Response: `201 Created` with generated documentation URL
* **Get Documentation**: `GET /docs/:id`
	+ Query Parameters: `language`
	+ Response: Generated documentation in the specified language

### AI Code Review

* **Create Code Review**: `POST /code_reviews`
	+ Request Body: `{project_id: integer, code_snippet: string}`
	+ Response: `201 Created` with code review ID
* **Get Code Reviews**: `GET /code_reviews`
	+ Query Parameters: `project_id`, `page`, `limit`
	+ Response: Array of code reviews with IDs and code snippets

### Project Analytics Dashboard

* **Get Analytics**: `GET /analytics`
	+ Query Parameters: `project_id`, `start_date`, `end_date`
	+ Response: JSON object containing project analytics data (e.g., task completion rate, team productivity)

**Error Handling**
All API endpoints will return a standard error response in the following format:
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": integer,
    "message": string
  }
}
```
**Security Considerations**
To ensure secure API usage, all requests must include valid authentication tokens. Tokens can be obtained by registering for an account on the DevPilot AI platform.

**Future Scope**
The following APIs are planned for future development:

* **AI Scrum Master**: `POST /scrum_master` (create a new scrum master instance)
* **Automated Testing**: `POST /tests` (run automated tests for a project)
* **CI/CD Integration**: `POST /ci_cd` (integrate with continuous integration and deployment tools)
* **Mobile Application**: `GET /mobile_app` (download the DevPilot AI mobile app)
* **Voice-Based Project Assistant**: `POST /voice_assistant` (create a new voice-based project assistant instance)

**License**
The DevPilot AI API is licensed under the MIT License. See [LICENSE](LICENSE) for details.

**Contact Us**
For any questions, feedback, or support requests, please contact us at [support@devpilot.ai](mailto:support@devpilot.ai).

title: SRS - DevPilot AI
content:
**Software Requirements Specification (SRS) for DevPilot AI**

**Overview**
DevPilot AI is an innovative software development platform designed to streamline the entire software development lifecycle. This SRS document outlines the functional and non-functional requirements of the system, ensuring that it meets the needs of its target users.

**Functional Requirements**

### 1. AI Project Assistant

* The AI Project Assistant shall provide intelligent suggestions for project planning, task prioritization, and resource allocation.
* It shall analyze project data and offer insights to improve productivity, reduce delays, and enhance overall project success.
* The assistant shall be able to integrate with GitHub to track code changes and provide real-time feedback on coding best practices.

### 2. Smart Sprint Planning

* The system shall allow users to create custom sprint plans, including task assignments, deadlines, and dependencies.
* It shall automatically generate a sprint backlog based on project requirements and team capacity.
* Users shall be able to adjust the plan as needed, with the AI assistant providing suggestions for optimal resource allocation.

### 3. Kanban Task Management

* The system shall enable users to create and manage tasks using a Kanban board, including columns for To-Do, In Progress, and Done.
* It shall allow task assignments, prioritization, and dependencies, as well as real-time tracking of task progress.
* Users shall be able to filter and sort tasks by various criteria, such as priority, deadline, or assignee.

### 4. Team Collaboration & Chat

* The system shall provide a centralized chat platform for team members to communicate and collaborate on projects.
* It shall allow users to create channels, invite team members, and share files and links.
* The AI assistant shall be able to join conversations and offer suggestions based on project requirements.

### 5. GitHub Integration

* The system shall integrate with GitHub to track code changes, provide real-time feedback, and enable seamless version control.
* It shall allow users to create and manage repositories, branches, and pull requests.
* The AI assistant shall be able to analyze code changes and offer suggestions for improvement.

### 6. AI Documentation Generator

* The system shall generate high-quality documentation based on project requirements and code changes.
* It shall provide a template-driven approach to documentation creation, with the AI assistant offering suggestions for content and structure.
* Users shall be able to customize and edit generated documents as needed.

### 7. AI Code Review

* The system shall analyze code changes and provide real-time feedback on coding best practices, security, and maintainability.
* It shall offer suggestions for improvement, including code refactoring and optimization.
* Users shall be able to accept or reject suggested changes, with the AI assistant tracking progress.

### 8. Project Analytics Dashboard

* The system shall provide a centralized analytics dashboard to track project performance, team productivity, and code quality.
* It shall display key metrics, such as task completion rate, sprint velocity, and code coverage.
* Users shall be able to drill down into specific data points for detailed analysis.

### 9. Risk Prediction & Monitoring

* The system shall analyze project data and predict potential risks, including delays, scope creep, and resource constraints.
* It shall provide real-time monitoring of risk levels and offer suggestions for mitigation.
* Users shall be able to adjust the plan as needed to minimize risks.

### 10. Knowledge Base with RAG (Red-Amber-Green)

* The system shall maintain a comprehensive knowledge base containing project best practices, coding standards, and industry trends.
* It shall provide a RAG rating system to track progress, highlighting areas that require attention or improvement.
* Users shall be able to access the knowledge base for guidance and training.

### 11. Real-Time Notifications

* The system shall send real-time notifications to users regarding project updates, task changes, and code reviews.
* It shall allow users to customize notification settings and prioritize alerts based on importance.

### 12. Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)

* The system shall implement RBAC to ensure secure access control for users with different roles and permissions.
* It shall provide a hierarchical structure for role assignments, allowing administrators to manage user access.

**Non-Functional Requirements**

### 1. Performance

* The system shall respond within 500ms to user input and queries.
* It shall maintain an average response time of less than 200ms for critical operations.

### 2. Security

* The system shall implement robust security measures, including encryption, authentication, and authorization.
* It shall comply with industry standards for data protection and confidentiality.

### 3. Scalability

* The system shall be designed to handle a minimum of 100 concurrent users and scale up to meet growing demands.
* It shall maintain performance and responsiveness even under heavy loads.

**Future Scope**

The following features are planned for future development:

1. AI Scrum Master: An AI-powered scrum master that assists with sprint planning, task assignment, and progress tracking.
2. Automated Testing: Integration with popular testing frameworks to automate unit tests, integration tests, and UI tests.
3. CI/CD Integration: Seamless integration with continuous integration and deployment tools for automated builds, tests, and deployments.
4. Mobile Application: A mobile app that provides on-the-go access to project data, task management, and collaboration features.
5. Voice-Based Project Assistant: A voice-controlled assistant that enables users to interact with the system using natural language processing.

**Assumptions and Dependencies**

1. The system shall be built using a modern web development stack, including React for the frontend and Node.js for the backend.
2. The AI assistant shall leverage machine learning algorithms and natural language processing techniques to provide intelligent suggestions and insights.
3. The system shall integrate with popular project management tools, such as GitHub, Jira, and Trello.

**References**

1. Agile Manifesto
2. Scrum Guide
3. GitHub API Documentation

By following this SRS document, the DevPilot AI team can ensure that the platform meets the needs of its target users and provides a comprehensive solution for software development teams.

title: README - DevPilot AI
content:
**DevPilot AI: Revolutionizing Software Development with Intelligence**
============================================================

Welcome to DevPilot AI, a cutting-edge platform designed to streamline the software development lifecycle. This comprehensive guide provides an overview of our features, technical specifications, and expected benefits.

**Overview**
-----------

DevPilot AI is an innovative solution that combines project management, task tracking, team collaboration, AI-powered assistance, sprint planning, documentation generation, code review, and analytics into a single platform. Our goal is to empower developers, students, startups, and project managers to work more efficiently, leveraging artificial intelligence to automate repetitive tasks and improve productivity.

**Key Features**
-------------

### AI Project Assistant

Our AI-powered assistant helps you stay on track by providing personalized task recommendations, automating routine tasks, and offering expert advice when needed.

### Smart Sprint Planning

Plan your sprints with ease using our intuitive planning tool. Set goals, prioritize tasks, and visualize your progress to ensure successful project delivery.

### Kanban Task Management

Visualize your workflow with our Kanban board, allowing you to track task status, assign team members, and monitor progress in real-time.

### Team Collaboration & Chat

Communicate effectively with your team using our built-in chat feature. Share files, ideas, and feedback seamlessly, fostering a collaborative environment.

### GitHub Integration

Integrate DevPilot AI with your GitHub repository for seamless code management, tracking, and collaboration.

### AI Documentation Generator

Automatically generate high-quality documentation for your project, reducing the time spent on writing and ensuring consistency across your team.

### AI Code Review

Get instant feedback on your code quality using our AI-powered review tool. Identify areas for improvement and optimize your coding process.

### Project Analytics Dashboard

Gain valuable insights into your project's performance with our analytics dashboard. Track progress, identify bottlenecks, and make data-driven decisions to improve your workflow.

### Risk Prediction & Monitoring

Stay ahead of potential risks by predicting and monitoring them proactively. Our AI-powered risk prediction tool helps you anticipate and mitigate issues before they impact your project.

### Knowledge Base with RAG (Red, Amber, Green)

Access a comprehensive knowledge base containing best practices, tutorials, and FAQs. Use our RAG system to quickly identify and address common issues.

### Real-Time Notifications

Stay informed about project updates, task changes, and team activity with real-time notifications. Never miss important events or deadlines again.

### Role-Based Access Control

Manage access levels for your team members, ensuring that each user has the necessary permissions to perform their tasks effectively.

**Target Users**
--------------

* Software Developers
* Student Project Teams
* Startups
* Freelancers
* Project Managers
* Software Organizations

**Expected Benefits**
-------------------

### Increased Productivity

Streamline your workflow and reduce repetitive tasks with AI-powered assistance, allowing you to focus on high-value activities.

### Better Team Coordination

Improve communication and collaboration among team members using our chat feature, Kanban board, and real-time notifications.

### Reduced Project Delays

Stay on track with smart sprint planning, risk prediction, and monitoring, ensuring that your project stays within scope and timeline.

### Automated Documentation

Generate high-quality documentation automatically, reducing the time spent on writing and ensuring consistency across your team.

### Improved Code Quality

Get instant feedback on your code quality using our AI-powered review tool, helping you optimize your coding process and improve overall code quality.

### Data-Driven Project Insights
---------------------------

Gain valuable insights into your project's performance with our analytics dashboard, allowing you to make data-driven decisions to improve your workflow.

**Future Scope**
--------------

* **AI Scrum Master**: Integrate AI-powered scrum master capabilities to further streamline your workflow.
* **Automated Testing**: Automate testing processes using AI-powered tools for faster and more accurate results.
* **CI/CD Integration**: Seamlessly integrate with continuous integration and deployment (CI/CD) pipelines for efficient project delivery.
* **Mobile Application**: Develop a mobile application for on-the-go access to DevPilot AI features.
* **Voice-Based Project Assistant**: Introduce voice-based assistance for hands-free control of your project workflow.

**Technical Specifications**
-------------------------

### Frontend

* Built using React and TypeScript
* Utilizes Material-UI for a modern and intuitive interface

### Backend

* Powered by Node.js and Express.js
* Integrates with MongoDB for efficient data storage and retrieval

### AI/ML

* Leverages TensorFlow and Keras for machine learning models
* Utilizes natural language processing (NLP) for text-based analysis and generation

**Conclusion**
----------

DevPilot AI is a game-changing platform that revolutionizes the software development lifecycle. By combining project management, task tracking, team collaboration, AI-powered assistance, sprint planning, documentation generation, code review, and analytics into a single platform, we empower developers, students, startups, and project managers to work more efficiently and effectively. Join us on this exciting journey and discover the power of DevPilot AI!

title: DEPLOYMENT - DevPilot AI
content:
**DevPilot AI Deployment Guide**

**Overview**
Congratulations on choosing DevPilot AI as your software development platform! This guide will walk you through the deployment process, ensuring a smooth transition for your team.

**Prerequisites**

* A modern web server (e.g., Nginx or Apache) with SSL/TLS encryption
* A relational database management system (RDBMS) like MySQL or PostgreSQL
* Node.js (version 14 or higher) and npm (Node Package Manager)
* React (version 17 or higher) for the frontend
* MongoDB (version 4.2 or higher) for storing project data

**Step 1: Set up the Database**

1. Install the RDBMS of your choice (e.g., MySQL or PostgreSQL).
2. Create a new database instance and configure it according to your needs.
3. Update the `database.js` file in the root directory with your chosen database credentials.

**Step 2: Configure the Server**

1. Set up your web server (e.g., Nginx or Apache) to serve the DevPilot AI application.
2. Configure the server to use SSL/TLS encryption for secure communication.
3. Update the `server.js` file in the root directory with your chosen server configuration.

**Step 3: Install Dependencies**

1. Run the command `npm install` in the root directory to install all required dependencies.
2. Verify that the following packages are installed:
	* `express`: for handling HTTP requests
	* `react`: for rendering the frontend
	* `mongodb`: for storing project data

**Step 4: Configure Frontend**

1. Update the `index.js` file in the `client` directory with your chosen React configuration.
2. Run the command `npm start` to start the frontend server.

**Step 5: Deploy the Application**

1. Upload the application code to your production environment (e.g., a cloud platform like AWS or Google Cloud).
2. Configure the server and database instances according to your production environment's requirements.
3. Update the `database.js` and `server.js` files with your chosen production environment credentials.

**Step 6: Configure Role-Based Access Control**

1. Set up role-based access control (RBAC) for your DevPilot AI instance.
2. Define roles for different user types (e.g., developers, project managers, administrators).
3. Assign users to their respective roles and configure permissions accordingly.

**Step 7: Integrate GitHub**

1. Configure the GitHub integration by setting up a webhook in your GitHub repository.
2. Update the `github.js` file in the root directory with your chosen GitHub credentials.

**Step 8: Configure AI Documentation Generator**

1. Set up the AI documentation generator by configuring the `ai-documentation-generator.js` file in the root directory.
2. Update the configuration to use your preferred documentation format (e.g., Markdown or HTML).

**Step 9: Configure Project Analytics Dashboard**

1. Set up the project analytics dashboard by configuring the `analytics-dashboard.js` file in the root directory.
2. Update the configuration to use your preferred data visualization library (e.g., D3.js or Chart.js).

**Troubleshooting and Support**
If you encounter any issues during deployment, refer to the DevPilot AI documentation or contact our support team for assistance.

**Future Scope**
DevPilot AI is designed to be highly extensible. Future scope includes:

* AI Scrum Master: integrating AI-powered scrum master functionality
* Automated Testing: implementing automated testing frameworks
* CI/CD Integration: setting up continuous integration and deployment pipelines
* Mobile Application: developing a mobile application for DevPilot AI
* Voice-Based Project Assistant: integrating voice-based project assistant functionality

**Conclusion**
Congratulations! You have successfully deployed DevPilot AI. This platform is designed to streamline your software development lifecycle, providing AI-powered assistance, smart sprint planning, and real-time analytics. With this guide, you're ready to start using DevPilot AI for your next project.

title: DEPLOYMENT - DevPilot AI
content:
**DevPilot AI Deployment Guide**
=====================================

**Table of Contents**
-----------------

1. [Prerequisites](#prerequisites)
2. [System Requirements](#system-requirements)
3. [Deployment Overview](#deployment-overview)
4. [Database Setup](#database-setup)
5. [API Configuration](#api-configuration)
6. [Frontend Deployment](#frontend-deployment)
7. [Backend Deployment](#backend-deployment)
8. [Integration with GitHub](#integration-with-github)
9. [Monitoring and Logging](#monitoring-and-logging)
10. [Troubleshooting](#troubleshooting)

**Prerequisites**
----------------

* Node.js (14.x or higher) installed on the system
* MongoDB (4.x or higher) installed on the system
* Git installed on the system
* A GitHub account for integration
* A MongoDB Atlas account for cloud deployment (optional)

**System Requirements**
----------------------

| Component | Minimum Requirements |
| --- | --- |
| CPU | 2x Intel Core i5 or equivalent |
| RAM | 8 GB or more |
| Storage | 256 GB or more |
| Operating System | Ubuntu 20.04 or higher (recommended) |

**Deployment Overview**
----------------------

DevPilot AI is a microservices-based architecture, consisting of the following components:

* **Frontend**: Built using React, responsible for user interface and interaction
* **Backend**: Built using Node.js, responsible for API endpoints and business logic
* **Database**: MongoDB, responsible for storing project data and user information
* **GitHub Integration**: Integrates with GitHub for version control and collaboration

**Database Setup**
-----------------

1. Install MongoDB on the system using the official MongoDB repository.
2. Create a new MongoDB database for DevPilot AI.
3. Configure the MongoDB connection string in the `config/database.js` file.

**API Configuration**
-------------------

1. Install the required dependencies using `npm install`.
2. Configure the API endpoints in the `config/api.js` file.
3. Start the API server using `node server.js`.

**Frontend Deployment**
----------------------

1. Clone the frontend repository using `git clone`.
2. Install the required dependencies using `npm install`.
3. Start the frontend server using `npm start`.

**Backend Deployment**
----------------------

1. Clone the backend repository using `git clone`.
2. Install the required dependencies using `npm install`.
3. Start the backend server using `node server.js`.

**Integration with GitHub**
-------------------------

1. Create a new GitHub OAuth application.
2. Configure the GitHub API endpoint in the `config/github.js` file.
3. Integrate the GitHub API with the DevPilot AI backend.

**Monitoring and Logging**
-------------------------

1. Install the required monitoring and logging tools using `npm install`.
2. Configure the monitoring and logging settings in the `config/monitoring.js` file.
3. Start the monitoring and logging services using `node monitoring.js`.

**Troubleshooting**
------------------

* Check the system logs for errors and warnings.
* Verify the MongoDB connection string and API endpoint configurations.
* Check the GitHub API integration settings.

**API Documentation**
--------------------

### API Endpoints

| Endpoint | Method | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `/api/projects` | GET | Retrieve a list of projects |
| `/api/projects/:id` | GET | Retrieve a project by ID |
| `/api/projects` | POST | Create a new project |
| `/api/projects/:id` | PUT | Update a project |
| `/api/projects/:id` | DELETE | Delete a project |

### API Request and Response Formats

| Format | Description |
| --- | --- |
| JSON | Used for API requests and responses |
| Form Data | Used for file uploads |

### API Authentication

* Basic Authentication: `username` and `password` are required for API requests
* OAuth 2.0: GitHub OAuth token is required for API requests

**README**
----------

DevPilot AI is an intelligent software development platform designed to streamline the entire software development lifecycle. It combines project management, task tracking, team collaboration, AI-powered assistance, sprint planning, documentation generation, code review, and analytics into a single unified platform.

### Features

* AI Project Assistant
* Smart Sprint Planning
* Kanban Task Management
* Team Collaboration & Chat
* GitHub Integration
* AI Documentation Generator
* AI Code Review
* Project Analytics Dashboard
* Risk Prediction & Monitoring
* Knowledge Base with RAG
* Real-Time Notifications
* Role-Based Access Control

### Benefits

* Increased Productivity
* Better Team Coordination
* Reduced Project Delays
* Automated Documentation
* Improved Code Quality
* Data-Driven Project Insights

### Future Scope

* AI Scrum Master
* Automated Testing
* CI/CD Integration
* Mobile Application
* Voice-Based Project Assistant
* Multi-Agent Development Workflows

title: README - DevPilot AI
content:
**DevPilot AI**
================

**Overview**
------------

DevPilot AI is a cutting-edge software development platform designed to revolutionize the way teams collaborate, manage projects, and develop software. By integrating AI-powered assistance, project management, task tracking, team collaboration, and analytics into a single unified platform, DevPilot AI aims to increase productivity, improve code quality, and reduce project delays.

**Key Features**
----------------

### AI Project Assistant

* **Intelligent Task Suggestions**: DevPilot AI's AI Project Assistant analyzes project requirements and suggests tasks to team members, ensuring that all necessary steps are covered.
* **Automated Task Assignment**: The AI Assistant assigns tasks to team members based on their skills, availability, and workload, minimizing conflicts and maximizing productivity.
* **Real-Time Task Updates**: Team members can update task status, and the AI Assistant will automatically adjust task assignments and project timelines accordingly.

### Smart Sprint Planning

* **AI-Driven Sprint Planning**: DevPilot AI's AI-powered sprint planning feature analyzes project requirements, team capacity, and historical data to suggest optimal sprint plans, ensuring that teams are working on the most critical tasks.
* **Automated Sprint Backlog Management**: The AI Assistant manages sprint backlogs, ensuring that tasks are properly prioritized, and dependencies are identified.

### Kanban Task Management

* **Visual Task Board**: DevPilot AI's Kanban task management feature provides a visual task board, allowing team members to easily track task progress and identify bottlenecks.
* **Drag-and-Drop Task Reordering**: Team members can reorder tasks on the board, and the AI Assistant will automatically update task dependencies and project timelines.

### Team Collaboration & Chat

* **Real-Time Messaging**: DevPilot AI's team collaboration feature provides real-time messaging, enabling team members to communicate and collaborate on tasks and projects.
* **File Sharing and Collaboration**: Team members can share files and collaborate on documents, ensuring that everyone has access to the latest information.

### GitHub Integration

* **Automated Code Push**: DevPilot AI integrates with GitHub, allowing team members to push code changes directly from the platform.
* **Automated Code Review**: The AI Assistant reviews code changes, providing feedback and suggestions for improvement.

### AI Documentation Generator

* **Automated Documentation**: DevPilot AI's AI Documentation Generator creates high-quality documentation, including project requirements, design documents, and technical specifications.
* **Automated Code Comments**: The AI Assistant generates code comments, ensuring that code is properly documented and maintainable.

### AI Code Review

* **Automated Code Review**: DevPilot AI's AI Code Review feature analyzes code changes, identifying potential issues and suggesting improvements.
* **Code Quality Metrics**: The AI Assistant provides code quality metrics, enabling teams to track and improve code quality over time.

### Project Analytics Dashboard

* **Real-Time Project Metrics**: DevPilot AI's Project Analytics Dashboard provides real-time project metrics, including task completion rates, team productivity, and project timelines.
* **Data-Driven Decision Making**: The AI Assistant provides data-driven insights, enabling teams to make informed decisions and optimize project workflows.

### Risk Prediction & Monitoring

* **Automated Risk Identification**: DevPilot AI's Risk Prediction & Monitoring feature identifies potential risks and issues, enabling teams to take proactive measures to mitigate them.
* **Real-Time Risk Updates**: The AI Assistant provides real-time risk updates, ensuring that teams are always aware of potential issues.

### Knowledge Base with RAG

* **Centralized Knowledge Base**: DevPilot AI's Knowledge Base provides a centralized repository of project knowledge, including requirements, design documents, and technical specifications.
* **Risk and Action Grid (RAG)**: The AI Assistant creates a RAG, enabling teams to track and manage risks and actions.

### Real-Time Notifications

* **Automated Notifications**: DevPilot AI's Real-Time Notifications feature sends automated notifications, ensuring that team members are always aware of project updates and changes.

### Role-Based Access Control

* **Fine-Grained Access Control**: DevPilot AI's Role-Based Access Control feature provides fine-grained access control, ensuring that team members have access to only the information and features they need.

**Target Users**
----------------

* **Software Developers**: DevPilot AI is designed to support software developers, providing AI-powered assistance, project management, and team collaboration features.
* **Student Project Teams**: The platform is ideal for student project teams, providing a centralized repository of project knowledge and automated task management features.
* **Startups**: DevPilot AI is designed to support startups, providing agile project management, team collaboration, and AI-powered assistance features.
* **Freelancers**: The platform is ideal for freelancers, providing a centralized repository of project knowledge and automated task management features.
* **Project Managers**: DevPilot AI is designed to support project managers, providing AI-powered project management, team collaboration, and analytics features.

**Expected Benefits**
----------------------

* **Increased Productivity**: DevPilot AI's AI-powered assistance and automated task management features enable teams to work more efficiently, increasing productivity and reducing project delays.
* **Better Team Coordination**: The platform's team collaboration features ensure that team members are always aware of project updates and changes, improving team coordination and communication.
* **Reduced Project Delays**: DevPilot AI's automated task management and project planning features ensure that teams are always on track, reducing project delays and improving overall project success.
* **Automated Documentation**: The AI Documentation Generator creates high-quality documentation, reducing the time and effort required to create and maintain project documentation.
* **Improved Code Quality**: DevPilot AI's AI Code Review feature analyzes code changes, identifying potential issues and suggesting improvements, improving code quality and reducing bugs.

**Future Scope**
----------------

* **AI Scrum Master**: DevPilot AI will integrate AI-powered Scrum Master features, providing automated sprint planning, task assignment, and project tracking.
* **Automated Testing**: The platform will integrate automated testing features, enabling teams to run automated tests and ensure code quality.
* **CI/CD Integration**: DevPilot AI will integrate with CI/CD tools, enabling teams to automate code deployment and ensure continuous integration and delivery.
* **Mobile Application**: The platform will provide a mobile application, enabling team members to access project information and collaborate on tasks and projects on-the-go.
* **Voice-Based Project Assistant**: DevPilot AI will integrate voice-based project assistant features, enabling team members to interact with the platform using voice commands.

**Technical Requirements**
-------------------------

* **Frontend**: DevPilot AI will be built using React, providing a responsive and user-friendly interface.
* **Backend**: The platform will be built using Node.js, providing a scalable and secure backend infrastructure.
* **Database**: DevPilot AI will use MongoDB, providing a flexible and scalable database solution.
* **AI Engine**: The platform will use a custom-built AI engine, providing AI-powered assistance and automated task management features.

**Getting Started**
-------------------

To get started with DevPilot AI, please follow these steps:

1. Sign up for a free trial account on our website.
2. Install the DevPilot AI mobile application on your device.
3. Configure your project settings and invite team members to join.
4. Start using the platform to manage your projects and collaborate with your team.

**Support**
------------

For any questions or issues, please contact our support team at [support@devpilot.ai](mailto:support@devpilot.ai). We are always happy to help!

### Role-Based Access Control

**Target Users**
----------------

* **Software Developers**: DevPilot AI is designed to support software developers, providing AI-powered assistance, project management, and team collaboration features.
* **Student Project Teams**: The platform is ideal for student project teams, providing a centralized repository for project knowledge, automated task management, and real-time collaboration.

* **Better Team Coordination**: The platform's real-time collaboration and communication features ensure that team members are aligned and working towards common goals.

title: SRS - Investiq
content:
**Investiq Software Requirements Specification (SRS)**

**Overview**
===============

Investiq is a mutual fund portfolio system and stock market platform, designed to provide users with a comprehensive and user-friendly experience for managing their investments. The system will be built using the PERN stack (PostgreSQL, Express.js, React, Node.js), with integration with Stripe for payment processing and Yahoo Finance for real-time market data.

**Functional Requirements**
==========================

### User Management

* **User Registration**: Users can register for an account by providing their name, email, and password.
* **User Login**: Users can log in to their account using their email and password.
* **User Profile**: Users can view and edit their profile information, including their name, email, and password.
* **User Portfolio**: Users can view their portfolio of investments, including the current value of their investments and the performance of their portfolio over time.

### Investment Management

* **Mutual Fund Selection**: Users can select from a list of available mutual funds to invest in.
* **Stock Selection**: Users can select from a list of available stocks to invest in.
* **Investment Amount**: Users can specify the amount they wish to invest in a particular mutual fund or stock.
* **Investment Frequency**: Users can specify the frequency of their investments, including daily, weekly, or monthly.
* **Investment Status**: Users can view the status of their investments, including the current value of their investments and the performance of their portfolio over time.

### Payment Processing

* **Stripe Integration**: Investiq will integrate with Stripe for payment processing, allowing users to make payments using their credit or debit card.
* **Payment Methods**: Users can select from a list of available payment methods, including credit or debit card.
* **Payment Status**: Users can view the status of their payments, including the date and amount of the payment.

### Market Data

* **Yahoo Finance Integration**: Investiq will integrate with Yahoo Finance for real-time market data, providing users with up-to-date information on the performance of their investments.
* **Market Data**: Users can view real-time market data, including the current price of their investments and the performance of their portfolio over time.

### Reporting and Analytics

* **Portfolio Performance**: Users can view the performance of their portfolio over time, including the current value of their investments and the returns on their investments.
* **Investment Returns**: Users can view the returns on their investments, including the current value of their investments and the returns on their investments.
* **Tax Reporting**: Users can view tax-related information, including the current value of their investments and the returns on their investments.

**Non-Functional Requirements**
=============================

### Performance

* **Response Time**: The system should respond to user requests within 2 seconds.
* **Throughput**: The system should be able to handle a minimum of 100 concurrent users.

### Security

* **Authentication**: The system should use secure authentication mechanisms to protect user data.
* **Authorization**: The system should use secure authorization mechanisms to restrict access to user data.
* **Data Encryption**: The system should use secure data encryption mechanisms to protect user data.

### Usability

* **User Interface**: The system should have a user-friendly interface that is easy to navigate.
* **Accessibility**: The system should be accessible to users with disabilities.

**Technical Requirements**
=========================

### Database

* **PostgreSQL**: The system will use PostgreSQL as its database management system.
* **Schema**: The system will use a schema to organize its data.

### Frontend

* **React**: The system will use React as its frontend framework.
* **Components**: The system will use components to build its user interface.

### Backend

* **Node.js**: The system will use Node.js as its backend framework.
* **API**: The system will use an API to interact with its frontend.

### Payment Processing

* **Stripe**: The system will use Stripe for payment processing.
* **API**: The system will use the Stripe API to interact with Stripe.

### Market Data

* **Yahoo Finance**: The system will use Yahoo Finance for real-time market data.
* **API**: The system will use the Yahoo Finance API to interact with Yahoo Finance.

**Deployment**
=============

### Infrastructure

* **Cloud Provider**: The system will be deployed on a cloud provider, such as AWS or Google Cloud.
* **Server**: The system will be deployed on a server, such as a virtual machine or a container.

### Configuration

* **Environment Variables**: The system will use environment variables to configure its settings.
* **Configuration Files**: The system will use configuration files to configure its settings.

### Monitoring

* **Monitoring Tools**: The system will use monitoring tools, such as Prometheus and Grafana, to monitor its performance.
* **Alerting**: The system will use alerting mechanisms, such as PagerDuty, to alert its operators of issues.

**API Documentation**
=====================

### API Endpoints

* **GET /users**: Retrieves a list of users.
* **POST /users**: Creates a new user.
* **GET /users/{id}**: Retrieves a user by ID.
* **PUT /users/{id}**: Updates a user by ID.
* **DELETE /users/{id}**: Deletes a user by ID.

* **GET /investments**: Retrieves a list of investments.
* **POST /investments**: Creates a new investment.
* **GET /investments/{id}**: Retrieves an investment by ID.
* **PUT /investments/{id}**: Updates an investment by ID.
* **DELETE /investments/{id}**: Deletes an investment by ID.

* **GET /payments**: Retrieves a list of payments.
* **POST /payments**: Creates a new payment.
* **GET /payments/{id}**: Retrieves a payment by ID.
* **PUT /payments/{id}**: Updates a payment by ID.
* **DELETE /payments/{id}**: Deletes a payment by ID.

### API Request and Response Formats

* **JSON**: The API will use JSON as its request and response format.

### API Security

* **Authentication**: The API will use secure authentication mechanisms to protect user data.
* **Authorization**: The API will use secure authorization mechanisms to restrict access to user data.

**README**
==========

### Getting Started

1. Clone the repository using `git clone`.
2. Install the dependencies using `npm install`.
3. Start the server using `npm start`.
4. Open a web browser and navigate to `http://localhost:3000`.

### Contributing

1. Fork the repository using `git fork`.
2. Create a new branch using `git branch`.
3. Make changes to the code.
4. Commit the changes using `git commit`.
5. Push the changes to the remote repository using `git push`.

### License

The code is licensed under the MIT License.

### Copyright

Copyright (c) [Year] [Author]. All rights reserved.
